description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box with a predominantly blue and white color scheme, featuring the branding 'Jules Destrooper' prominently on its sides and top. The box is decorated with images of thin, oval-shaped waffle cookies, suggesting it contains edible goods. The sides of the box are deep blue, while the top is mostly white with blue accents and cookie illustrations. The box appears to be sealed and is likely lightweight, typical of commercial food packaging. The text 'YOU LOVE THIS AND SO WE DO' is visible on the shorter ends, reinforcing its branding and marketing appeal. The overall construction is rigid and designed for easy stacking or transport.
description: A blue and white rectangular cardboard box with 'Jules Destrooper' branding and waffle cookie images, likely used for packaging food items.
description_view_0: The long side of the box is visible, showing the 'Jules Destrooper' logo on a blue background with partial cookie images on the top.
description_view_1: The short end of the box is shown, featuring the phrase 'YOU LOVE THIS AND SO WE DO' and a partial view of the top branding.
description_view_2: Another long side is visible, nearly identical to view 0, with the 'Jules Destrooper' logo and cookie images.
description_view_3: The opposite short end is shown, again displaying the 'YOU LOVE THIS AND SO WE DO' text and the top branding.
